questions.question: Jaký je poměr počtu internetových objednávek k počtu zákazníků?
questions.executed_mdx_query:
WITH 
MEMBER [Measures].[InternetOrderCount] AS
    COUNT(
        NONEMPTY(
            [Internet Sales Order Details].[Internet Sales Orders].[Order Number].Members,
            {[Measures].[Internet Sales Amount]}
        )
    ),
MEMBER [Measures].[OrderToCustomerRatio] AS
    IIF([Measures].[Customer Count] = 0, NULL,
        [Measures].[InternetOrderCount] / [Measures].[Customer Count])
SELECT 
    {[Measures].[OrderToCustomerRatio]} ON COLUMNS
FROM [Adventure Works]
predicted: [Internet Sales Order Details].[Internet Sales Orders].[Order Number]
